<> To replace one URL with another in PHP you can use the str_replace function which handles multiple occurrences automatically $oldUrl = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $newUrl = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $text = 'New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $result = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $text); This code will update every instance of the old link to the new link within your string The word level is a palindrome that reads the same forward and backward
